016 */
017package org.apache.juneau.petstore.service;
018
019import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.ThrowableUtils.*;
020
021import java.io.*;
022import java.nio.charset.*;
023import java.util.*;
024import java.util.concurrent.*;
025import java.util.concurrent.atomic.*;
026
027import org.apache.juneau.marshall.json5.*;
028import org.apache.juneau.petstore.dto.*;
029
030/**
031 * In-memory {@link Pet}/{@link Order}/{@link User} store seeded from classpath JSON.
032 *
033 * <p>
034 * Backed by {@link ConcurrentHashMap}s; pet and order IDs auto-assign via {@link AtomicLong} starting from
035 * the highest seeded ID plus one (or {@code 1} if no seeds existed).  Seed files live on the classpath at
036 * {@code petstore/init/{Pets,Orders,Users}.json} and are loaded lazily on first access.
037 *
038 * <p>
039 * This is a sample/demo store — there is no persistence, no transactions, and no replication.  Restart wipes
040 * state back to the seeded baseline.
041 *
042 * <h5 class='section'>See Also:</h5><ul>
043 *    <li class='link'><a class="doclink" href="https://juneau.apache.org/docs/topics/JuneauPetstoreOverview">juneau-petstore</a>
044 * </ul>
045 */
046public class PetStore {
047
048   private static final String SEED_PETS = "petstore/init/Pets.json";
049   private static final String SEED_ORDERS = "petstore/init/Orders.json";
050   private static final String SEED_USERS = "petstore/init/Users.json";
051
052   private final Map<Long,Pet> pets = new ConcurrentHashMap<>();
053   private final Map<Long,Order> orders = new ConcurrentHashMap<>();
054   private final Map<String,User> users = new ConcurrentHashMap<>();
055
056   private final AtomicLong nextPetId = new AtomicLong();
057   private final AtomicLong nextOrderId = new AtomicLong();
058
059   /**
060    * Constructor.
061    *
062    * <p>
063    * Eagerly loads the bundled classpath seed data.
064    */
065   public PetStore() {
066      var seededPets = loadList(SEED_PETS, Pet.class);
067      var maxPetId = 0L;
068      for (var p : seededPets) {
069         if (p.getId() == 0L)
070            p.setId(++maxPetId);
071         else
072            maxPetId = Math.max(maxPetId, p.getId());
073         pets.put(p.getId(), p);
074      }
075      nextPetId.set(maxPetId);
076
077      var seededOrders = loadList(SEED_ORDERS, Order.class);
078      var maxOrderId = 0L;
079      for (var o : seededOrders) {
080         if (o.getId() == 0L)
081            o.setId(++maxOrderId);
082         else
083            maxOrderId = Math.max(maxOrderId, o.getId());
084         orders.put(o.getId(), o);
085      }
086      nextOrderId.set(maxOrderId);
087
088      var seededUsers = loadList(SEED_USERS, User.class);
089      for (var u : seededUsers)
090         users.put(u.getUsername(), u);
091   }
092
093   private static <T> List<T> loadList(String resourcePath, Class<T> elementType) {
094      var loader = PetStore.class.getClassLoader();
095      try (var in = loader.getResourceAsStream(resourcePath)) {
096         if (in == null)
097            return new ArrayList<>();
098         try (var reader = new InputStreamReader(in, StandardCharsets.UTF_8)) {
099            return Json5Parser.DEFAULT.parse(reader, List.class, elementType);
100         }
101      } catch (Exception e) {
102         throw bex(e, "Failed to load petstore seed resource ''{0}''", resourcePath);
103      }
104   }
105
106   //------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
107   // Pets
108   //------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
109
110   /**
111    * Returns all pets.
112    *
113    * @return All pets, in arbitrary order.  Never <jk>null</jk>.
114    */
115   public Collection<Pet> getPets() {
116      return pets.values();
117   }
118
119   /**
120    * Returns a pet by ID.
121    *
122    * @param id The pet ID.
123    * @return The pet, or <jk>null</jk> if not found.
124    */
125   public Pet getPet(long id) {
126      return pets.get(id);
127   }
128
129   /**
130    * Creates a new pet.
131    *
132    * <p>
133    * Assigns the next available ID, ignoring any caller-supplied ID.
134    *
135    * @param pet The pet to create.  Must not be <jk>null</jk>.
136    * @return The created pet (same instance, with assigned ID).
137    */
138   public Pet createPet(Pet pet) {
139      if (pet == null)
140         throw illegalArg("Pet must not be null");
141      var id = nextPetId.incrementAndGet();
142      pet.setId(id);
143      pets.put(id, pet);
144      return pet;
145   }
146
147   /**
148    * Updates an existing pet.
149    *
150    * @param pet The pet to update.  Must not be <jk>null</jk>; must carry an ID matching an existing pet.
151    * @return The updated pet.
152    * @throws PetstoreNotFoundException If no pet with the given ID exists.
153    */
154   public Pet updatePet(Pet pet) {
155      if (pet == null)
156         throw illegalArg("Pet must not be null");
157      if (! pets.containsKey(pet.getId()))
158         throw new PetstoreNotFoundException("Pet not found: id=" + pet.getId());
159      pets.put(pet.getId(), pet);
160      return pet;
161   }
162
163   /**
164    * Deletes a pet by ID.
165    *
166    * @param id The pet ID.
167    * @throws PetstoreNotFoundException If no pet with the given ID exists.
168    */
169   public void deletePet(long id) {
170      if (pets.remove(id) == null)
171         throw new PetstoreNotFoundException("Pet not found: id=" + id);
172   }
173
174   //------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
175   // Orders
176   //------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
177
178   /**
179    * Returns all orders.
180    *
181    * @return All orders, in arbitrary order.  Never <jk>null</jk>.
182    */
183   public Collection<Order> getOrders() {
184      return orders.values();
185   }
186
187   /**
188    * Returns an order by ID.
189    *
190    * @param id The order ID.
191    * @return The order, or <jk>null</jk> if not found.
192    */
193   public Order getOrder(long id) {
194      return orders.get(id);
195   }
196
197   /**
198    * Creates a new order.
199    *
200    * <p>
201    * Assigns the next available ID, ignoring any caller-supplied ID.
202    *
203    * @param order The order to create.  Must not be <jk>null</jk>.
204    * @return The created order (same instance, with assigned ID).
205    */
206   public Order createOrder(Order order) {
207      if (order == null)
208         throw illegalArg("Order must not be null");
209      var id = nextOrderId.incrementAndGet();
210      order.setId(id);
211      orders.put(id, order);
212      return order;
213   }
214
215   /**
216    * Updates an existing order.
217    *
218    * @param order The order to update.  Must not be <jk>null</jk>; must carry an ID matching an existing order.
219    * @return The updated order.
220    * @throws PetstoreNotFoundException If no order with the given ID exists.
221    */
222   public Order updateOrder(Order order) {
223      if (order == null)
224         throw illegalArg("Order must not be null");
225      if (! orders.containsKey(order.getId()))
226         throw new PetstoreNotFoundException("Order not found: id=" + order.getId());
227      orders.put(order.getId(), order);
228      return order;
229   }
230
231   /**
232    * Deletes an order by ID.
233    *
234    * @param id The order ID.
235    * @throws PetstoreNotFoundException If no order with the given ID exists.
236    */
237   public void deleteOrder(long id) {
238      if (orders.remove(id) == null)
239         throw new PetstoreNotFoundException("Order not found: id=" + id);
240   }
241
242   //------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
243   // Users
244   //------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
245
246   /**
247    * Returns all users.
248    *
249    * @return All users, in arbitrary order.  Never <jk>null</jk>.
250    */
251   public Collection<User> getUsers() {
252      return users.values();
253   }
254
255   /**
256    * Returns a user by username.
257    *
258    * @param username The username (primary key).
259    * @return The user, or <jk>null</jk> if not found.
260    */
261   public User getUser(String username) {
262      return users.get(username);
263   }
264
265   /**
266    * Creates a new user.
267    *
268    * @param user The user to create.  Must not be <jk>null</jk>; must carry a non-null username not already in use.
269    * @return The created user.
270    * @throws IllegalArgumentException If the username is already in use.
271    */
272   public User createUser(User user) {
273      if (user == null)
274         throw illegalArg("User must not be null");
275      if (user.getUsername() == null)
276         throw illegalArg("User username must not be null");
277      if (users.putIfAbsent(user.getUsername(), user) != null)
278         throw illegalArg("User already exists: username=''{0}''", user.getUsername());
279      return user;
280   }
281
282   /**
283    * Updates an existing user.
284    *
285    * @param user The user to update.  Must not be <jk>null</jk>; must carry a username matching an existing user.
286    * @return The updated user.
287    * @throws PetstoreNotFoundException If no user with the given username exists.
288    */
289   public User updateUser(User user) {
290      if (user == null)
291         throw illegalArg("User must not be null");
292      if (! users.containsKey(user.getUsername()))
293         throw new PetstoreNotFoundException("User not found: username=" + user.getUsername());
294      users.put(user.getUsername(), user);
295      return user;
296   }
297
298   /**
299    * Deletes a user by username.
300    *
301    * @param username The username.
302    * @throws PetstoreNotFoundException If no user with the given username exists.
303    */
304   public void deleteUser(String username) {
305      if (users.remove(username) == null)
306         throw new PetstoreNotFoundException("User not found: username=" + username);
307   }
308}
